content: I have a local version of the OpenCPN wiki running. I need this because a plugin the creates the portable versions of html and pdf for the User Manual, times out on the OpenCPN Server. I have set up ACL and can edit and do all the normal things we can do on the OpenCPN server, but the two plugins Epub and SiteExplorer cannot seem to save files and I have not been able to figure out what is causing this. I have tried turning off Norton AV and Firewall (no difference), moving the DokuwikiStick entire directory to a user directory such as C:/user/username/Documents. I have tried to change the permissions on the entire Dokuwiiki directory from "read only" and all subdir and files, but it just changes back to read-only. I am out of ideas... can anyone with apache server experience (runnning on the C:drive) please advise?
